falsifiers.name: Akida wheel ARM64 install fail
falsifiers.trigger: pip install akida fails on RPi5 ARM64 (manylinux wheel missing or source build failure)
falsifiers.fallback: x86 host (mac M2 / ubu1 x86_64) hosts AKIDA inference; RPi5 demoted to ADM encoder only; explore USB-host bridge mode
falsifiers.rationale: BrainChip historically prioritizes x86_64 wheel distribution

falsifiers.name: cnn2snn 8-bit precision insufficient
falsifiers.trigger: EEG model 8-bit cnn2snn conversion -> baseline accuracy drop > 5%
falsifiers.fallback: 4-bit retrain via quantizeml.quantize_model(precision_in=4) or mixed-precision (input 8-bit, weight 4-bit)
falsifiers.downstream_impact: N-3 and N-5 affected; N-2/N-4/N-7 unaffected

falsifiers.name: spike rate < 1 spike/s
falsifiers.trigger: G-D1 fail -- some channel has <50 spikes over 60s synthetic window
falsifiers.fallback: ADM theta retune (0.5 sigma -> 0.3 sigma) or shorten z-score window (10s -> 5s)
falsifiers.downstream_impact: absorbed by N-2 spec ablation knobs (theta, dt_bin, refractory)

falsifiers.name: tension-modulated bias degrades baseline accuracy
falsifiers.trigger: bias alpha=0.2 ON -> G-D5 round-trip Pearson r drops > 0.05 vs baseline (alpha=0)
falsifiers.detection_signal: ablation table alpha=0.2 vs alpha=0 delta r > 0.05
falsifiers.fallback: Remove bias permanently (alpha=0); shift tension-modulation to N-3 layer side via decoder.tension_proj activation
falsifiers.downstream_impact: anima-specific extension fails gracefully; vendor-supported baseline preserved
falsifiers.rationale: highest probability among 5 -- anima-native untested extension; conservative path = baseline first

falsifiers.name: AKD1000 datasheet pJ/spike vs in-situ wattmeter mismatch > 2x
falsifiers.trigger: D+3 N-4 Landauer 3-axis -- datasheet vs RPi5 USB-C wattmeter measurement diverges > 2x
falsifiers.fallback: Vendor query + separated measurement (idle vs max-load); declare datasheet value as conservative range
falsifiers.downstream_impact: N-4 thermodynamic anchor weakened; N-2/N-3 unaffected

honest_c3: C3-1 AKIDA arrival ETA undetermined (vendor logistics, anima-side uncontrollable) -- entire plan is hypothetical until arrival
C3-2 ARM64 wheel availability gates entire user D+0 path on a single check
C3-3 BrainChip Meta TF SDK changes frequently (cnn2snn API broke twice in last 6 months); plan does not pin SDK version
C3-4 tension-modulated ADM polarity bias is anima-specific extension, vendor unsupported -- F-AK-4 has highest probability (0.50)
C3-5 6 axes cascade is N-2 single-point-of-failure; no simulation-only fallback defined for total N-2 collapse
C3-6 RPi5 + AKD1000 PCIe gen2 stability not field-verified; kernel module dkms / IRQ conflicts reported in BrainChip community
C3-7 D+2 N-3 last-layer projection bypasses transformer self-attention via JL projection 768->16; information loss not quantified
C3-8 D+3 N-7 ANU QRNG depends on public HTTP API (1 req/sec rate limit); network outage delays D+3
C3-9 user 1-page checklist assumes hardware skill (M.2 mount, /boot/firmware edit); non-expert duration may extend to 2-3 hours
